content: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience to your gaming experience. We've noted your report and are currently discussing it.🌹
💭「Processing」My game is being dissoluted
已收到，感谢反馈~🥰
💭「處理中」文本錯誤？
嗯嗯這次發錯了！正在申請補發啦~
The wrong reward was sent this time! I'm applying for a replacement.
Are you going to pull for Arachne?
Thanks for the feedback! To help us investigate, could you please share a screenshot of the error message along with your UID?
💭「Processing」Bug: Error code 7004006
just to know, is the problem resolved or was even there? or it was just a little misunderstanding?
I am gonna venture on the side of misunderstanding. I could be kinda dumb who knows. <:Nautila_think:1459077762684948500>
We are looking into this issue. To help us resolve it more efficiently, could you let us know if you upgraded your system before the problem occurred?
I did upgrade my system a couple of days ago, but I’m not sure if the issue occurred for the first time before or after the upgrade. Probably after?

Her we go. Another ream mastery unit. Dev: We know ream mastery bad and need to rework this mechanic. As far as i understand, "Divine ream" is a universal fix for all problems? When vortice released a lot ppl start to thinking do RM covenant BUT WHAT A PROBLEM a lot of realm mastery covenant is shit. Maybe need to fix that before release new ream mastery awakener?
im down to just buff the scalings of RM as a whole, that can be considered a good bandage no?
They could do some small fixes for it, honestly the worse one is ultra, mostly because is random, in the realm where you normally want to calculate and plan your stuff
they could just make it a bar that increase every turn start and give you an insight when is full, or put it in the draw pile if the hand is full

Ultra 

past 100% for annihaltion 

every other point of RM boosts Ultra turn dmg %
done fixed
no more rng
And Ultra space cards really need to go into hand before random insights
that become another problem, the game has too much damage to let you plan a full power ultra turn most of the time, and it would give you no benefit until you enter it
i hate that if you get an insight whit a full hand it is burned and not added in the draw or even discard pile
im just spit balling ;/
Yeah, but its even worse when you lose a card from ultra space because a random insight meant you didnt have space for it <:flop1:1356083604236800030>
yeah

We sincerely apologize for the delay in providing this information. This version outlook was divided into three parts, with the description of the new prop shown in another image.
What I can tell you right now is that it is a "Priority use" prop and will not disappear for no reason. It has the function of Luminous Cores.
Ethereal cores will guarantee banner unit. NO 50/50s.
